name: Data Craft
description_en: Generate beautiful, self-contained themed HTML data displays—charts, dashboards, reports, tearsheets, briefings—in one of six visual idioms, each with a matched visual language and writing voice so the format and tone fit the content.
description_zh: 生成精美、自包含的主题化 HTML 数据展示——图表、仪表盘、报告、tearsheet、简报——提供六种视觉范式,每种都有匹配的视觉语言与文字语气,让格式与语气贴合内容。
long_en: Goes beyond styling to pair each data document with a voice—a finance tearsheet reads like a terminal, a culture story like a broadsheet—producing data-driven documents, not just charts.
long_zh: 不止于美化,还为每份数据文档配上语气——财务 tearsheet 读起来像终端、文化报道像大报——产出的是数据驱动的文档,而不仅是图表。
sec_note_en: Renders self-contained HTML locally from the data you provide; no network access required.
sec_note_zh: 用你提供的数据在本地渲染自包含 HTML;无需联网。
